goal: Implement P1.1: make the orchestrate loop's pause button actually halt execution. The pause_requested flag exists on OrchestrateRun and the UI endpoint flips it, but the executor loop never checks it — users click Pause yet the run keeps consuming tasks and budget.

tasks.name: Add _check_pause() helper and cooperative gate in orchestrate loop
tasks.instruction: In platform/app/api/pipeline.py: add _check_pause(db, run_id) that does db.expire_all() then reads pause_requested fresh. Insert the gate at the top of the orchestrate while-loop (before claiming the next task). On pause: set status=PAUSED, paused_at=now(), current_phase=paused, break. finished_at must stay NULL. Return {tasks_run, results, stopped_reason: paused}.

acceptance_criteria.text: Orchestrate loop checks pause flag before each task claim and halts with status=PAUSED
Paused run has PAUSED status accepted by CHECK constraint

exclusions: Do not touch tier1.py pause/resume endpoints (owned by T-002/T-003)

produces.function: _check_pause(db, run_id) -> bool; pause gate before task claim in orchestrate loop

tasks.name: Add POST /orchestrate-runs/{id}/pause endpoint
tasks.instruction: In platform/app/api/tier1.py: add POST /orchestrate-runs/{run_id}/pause. Sets pause_requested=True. Rejects 409 for terminal states (DONE/FAILED/CANCELLED/BUDGET_EXCEEDED). Returns {run_id, pause_requested: true, status}.

acceptance_criteria.text: POST /pause sets flag and returns 200 for RUNNING run

exclusions: Do not modify _check_pause or orchestrate loop (owned by T-001)
Do not add resume endpoint (owned by T-003)

tasks.name: Add POST /orchestrate-runs/{id}/resume endpoint
tasks.instruction: In platform/app/api/tier1.py: add POST /orchestrate-runs/{run_id}/resume. PAUSED: clear flag, set resumed_at, set status=RUNNING, respawn background worker. RUNNING+flag: clear flag only, no respawn. Terminal: 409. Returns {run_id, pause_requested: false, respawned: bool}.

acceptance_criteria.text: Resume PAUSED: respawned=true, DB status != PAUSED, resumed_at set

exclusions: Do not modify pause endpoint (owned by T-002)
Do not touch pipeline.py loop (owned by T-001)

tasks.name: Expose pause fields in run status endpoint and render Resume in UI panel
tasks.instruction: Verify platform/app/api/pipeline.py GET /orchestrate-runs/{id} returns pause_requested, paused_at, resumed_at. Verify platform/app/templates/_orchestrate_panel.html shows Resume button for PAUSED status. Integration tests confirm both.

acceptance_criteria.text: UI panel /orchestrate-runs/{id}/panel renders PAUSED badge and Resume button

exclusions: Do not modify pause/resume endpoints (owned by T-002/T-003)
